description: Golden RAG evaluation set — extend with domain-specific Q/A pairs per deployment

corpus.text: All production AI models require governance approval before deployment. High-risk models under the EU AI Act additionally require a documented human review and a registered model card.
Token budgets are enforced per project on a monthly basis. When a project exceeds 80 percent of its budget, engineers and the project owner receive a notification.
Documents uploaded to a knowledge base are versioned. Re-uploading a file with the same name creates a new version and removes the vectors of the previous version after successful indexing.

cases.question: What do high-risk models require before deployment?
When are project owners notified about token budgets?
What happens when I re-upload a document with the same name?
